three years of pre-MS experience in product analytics at a consumer fintech.
Strong SQL, dbt, and Python; comfortable presenting findings to non-technical
stakeholders.

## Education

**MS Business Analytics**, Central European University, Vienna · 2024–2026
GPA: 3.9 / 4.0. Capstone: customer-segmentation model for a Vienna-based
SaaS retention team (engagement +18% in the treated cohort).

**BSc Statistics**, Eötvös Loránd University, Budapest · 2018–2021

## Experience

**Product Analyst**, MintPay GmbH, Vienna · 2021–2024
- Built the company's first revenue-attribution model in dbt (~40 models, 6
  data sources). Cut weekly reporting time from 8 hours to 20 minutes.
- Owned the A/B testing pipeline: 60+ experiments shipped, 18 reached
  decision quality, 4 had material revenue impact.
- Mentored two junior analysts through SQL and experiment-design ramp-up.

**Data Intern**, Magyar Telekom, Budapest · Summer 2020
- Cleaned three years of customer-churn survey data; produced a one-pager

## Skills

SQL (advanced), Python (pandas, scikit-learn), dbt, Looker, Tableau, R,
basic Spark. Native German, fluent English, conversational Hungarian.

## Selected Projects

- **MintPay revenue attribution** — multi-touch model in dbt, served via
  Looker. Replaced a 2,000-row spreadsheet that was the source of monthly
  exec disagreements.
- **Capstone — SaaS retention segmentation** — k-means + propensity model
  on a 250k-user dataset; validated by a 2-week holdout test on the real

- **Side project — Vienna apartment rent regressor** — small Python project
